objection_text: I feel weird/cringe/awkward about praying or sharing my faith in public.
underlying_belief: Religion should be private and speaking of it makes me a 'preachy' or 'strange' person.
underlying_fear: Social exclusion, being judged as irrational or fanatical by peers.
counter_truth_angle: The cringe is the devil trying to block your peace. Stomp the snake's head.
transcript_proof_quote: [01:50:25] He's like, no, I feel weird about praying. I was like, why? [01:56:06] It was almost like the devil being like, ah, no, don't do that...

objection_text: My past is too dark for God to use me.
underlying_belief: God only works with 'pure' people, and my previous mistakes disqualify me from being an influence for good.
underlying_fear: Hypocrisy being exposed, or being truly an 'evil' person at the core.
counter_truth_angle: Your darkest skills are what God uses for your biggest mission.
transcript_proof_quote: [01:30:41] That skill that I was using for evil, God was giving me a skill so that I was able to...

objection_text: I'm terrified of dying and it creates constant low-level anxiety.
underlying_belief: Death is the 'end' and anything afterwards is uncertain or non-existent.
underlying_fear: Ceasing to exist, loss of everything tangible, or facing final judgment.
counter_truth_angle: Death is the ultimate adventure. Finding peace with it is the only way to truly live.
transcript_proof_quote: [00:32:00] I don't think I've ever had that much peace in accepting a situation... [00:32:46] I'm super excited to die. Not in the title way... I'm going to get to go to heaven?

objection_text: I'm not strong enough to carry my own burden (layoffs, breakup, etc.).
underlying_belief: I have to be'enough' and have my own strength to get through this.
underlying_fear: Failure, collapse, or realizing I'm actually weak and incapable.
counter_truth_angle: Admit you're weak. Let God carry the cross.
transcript_proof_quote: [00:11:00] When I feel like I can't carry my own cross. I'm like, God, I am not strong enough to carry my own cross, so help me out here.

objection_text: I don't have time for a full spiritual journey right now with work/travel mayhem.
underlying_belief: Doing spiritual work is a slow, ponderous process that requires a retreat or hours of study.
underlying_fear: That I'll fail at the task, so I shouldn't start until I can do it 'right'.
counter_truth_angle: The 20-second hack. Feed the algorithm with raw truth, not analysis.
transcript_proof_quote: [00:07:45] For the next two weeks, I have it auto set that it's just scheduled to send out... Our Fathers, Hail Marys... 20-second video.
